name: nc-bioinformatics-figure-skills
description: NC-style bioinformatics figure decision, visual QA, project scaffold, NC GitHub code mining, R package routing, code recipe drilldown, and R-first ncfigR/scfigR/spfigR/commfigR/trajfigR/benchfigR/multiomfigR plotting toolkit assistant with A1/A2/A3 GitHub code-pattern evidence.

interface.shortDescription: NC 生信 Figure 决策、QA、GitHub 挖掘、R 包路由与 ncfigR/scfigR/spfigR/commfigR/trajfigR/benchfigR/multiomfigR。
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that turns a Nature Communications-first, GitHub-code-backed bioinformatics visualization library into single-cell, spatial, multi-omics, communication, trajectory, benchmark, and genome-track figure decision support. It includes NC GitHub Code Mining Mode and R Package Router Mode, mapping statically inspected A1/A2/A3 repositories into reusable code patterns, source-data schemas, local R package targets such as ncfigR/scfigR/spfigR/commfigR/trajfigR/benchfigR/multiomfigR, and project-transfer plotting scaffolds. v2.1 includes working scfigR, spfigR, commfigR, trajfigR, benchfigR, and multiomfigR MVPs for single-cell Atlas Overview, spatial tissue niche, cell-cell communication, trajectory, benchmark plus biological case, and multi-omics integration figures while ncfigR remains the shared base and fallback toolkit.
defaultPrompt: Use nc-bioinformatics-figure-skills when the user wants to learn or design NC-style bioinformatics figures, decide what belongs in a main figure, choose plot types, assemble panels, audit visual quality, generate project plotting scaffolds, choose palettes, mine NC/Nature GitHub figure code, map repo patterns to local R plotting packages, inspect A1/A2/A3 GitHub-backed figure code, drill into repo-level code recipes, build a project-transfer code-learning scaffold, use local ncfigR/scfigR/spfigR/commfigR/trajfigR/benchfigR/multiomfigR R plotting toolkits, or generate reusable R/Python plotting templates.
